Product overview

What Are Our Vitamin B Complex Tablets?

B vitamins are vital to your body and mind, but combining the essential B vitamins in the right amount can be tricky. That's why we have formulated Vitamin B Complex Tablets, offering a perfect blend of 8 crucial B Vitamins in one tablet.

Unlike other vitamin B tablets, ours is enriched with vitamin C to give you well-rounded daily support. Each bottle contains 365 easy-to-swallow tablets, keeping you replenished for a whole year. Harness the benefits of nine vital vitamins with one Vitamin B Complex Tablet today!

Benefits of Vitamin B Complex Tablets

Our B Vitamin Complex Tablets are designed to support your well-being throughout the year by providing a powerful blend of essential nutrients. Here’s how they help:

  • Vitamin B12 contributes to normal psychological function*
  • Biotin (Vitamin B7) contributes to the maintenance of normal hair & skin*
  • Vitamin C and vitamin B12 contribute to the normal function of the immune system*
  • Riboflavin (vitamin B2), vitamin B12 and vitamin C contribute to the reduction of tiredness & fatigue*
  • Riboflavin (vitamin B2), vitamin B12 and vitamin C contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
  • Vitamin B12, Riboflavin and vitamin C contribute to the normal functioning of the nervous system*
  • Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin, bones, teeth, and gums*
Why Choose Our Vitamin B Complex Tablets?

*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

  • Here’s why we and our B vitamin complex tablets stand out from the regular vitamin B supplements -
  • Made with 20+ years of experience in creating 150+ trusted wellness supplements and fitness devices
  • Packed with all 8 essential B vitamins and added vitamin C, a powerful blend that’s hard to come by
  • 365 tablets per bottle for a massive 1-year supply in one go, more than most competitors offer
  • Just 1 easy-to-take B vitamin complex tablet a day, so you don't need to take multiple doses
  • 100% vegan and vegetarian-friendly, to be suitable for everyone irrespective of dietary choices
  • Packed in recyclable PET bottles to lower our carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice
  • Made to high GMP-certified standards to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
  • Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, allowing you to try the tablets with confidence
How to use

Take 1 tablet daily, preferably with a meal.

Ingredients

Microcrystalline Cellulose, Anti-Caking Agents: Rice Extract Blend and Silicon Dioxide

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 1 Tablets Servings per Container : 365

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid )80 mg100
Vitamin B3 (Niacin As Nicotinamide)24 mg150
Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid As D-Calcium Panthonate)20 mg300
Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride)10 mg714
Vitamin B1 (Thiamine As Thiamine Hydrochloride)10 mg909
Vitamin B27 mg500
Vitamin B9 (Folic Acid)200 mcg100
Biotin150 mcg300
Vitamin B12 (as Methylcobalamin)50 mcg2000
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications, or are under medical supervision, please consult a doctor or healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children. For best before end see the base.
